title: Ornament of the Middle Way
description: Shantarakshita's synthesis of Madhyamaka emptiness and Yogacara mind-only — the philosophical foundation of Tibetan Buddhism.
introduction: Shantarakshita's synthesis of Madhyamaka emptiness and Yogacara mind-only — the philosophical foundation of Tibetan Buddhism.

translation.text: All phenomena are free from arising — neither one nor many, neither identical nor different.
